title: Trizeuxis discolor

The Orchidaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Trizeuxis discolor being a part of the subfamily Spiranthoideae. The subfamily Spiranthoideae is a group of orchids characterized by their unique flowers and growth habits. Trizeuxis discolor is also a member of the tribe Cranichideae, which includes other orchid species with similar characteristics.

The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as exhibit antimicrobial activity against various pathogens.
